test_suite.details: 3677 passed, 1 failed. PROP-041 Phase 2 requires monitor/scripts/audit-rewrite.js but the file is absent. No ISS currently tracks this gap.

internal_anchors.details: Covered by test suite (Section 3: Internal Links). All href=#... targets and showTab() calls verified passing. WIN-057b and WIN-058b anchors present in rebuilt workspace HTML.

tab_structure.details: Covered by test suite (Sections 4, 9). No failures on tab structure or nav chain.

external_links.details: All 13 checked data-source links resolve. DOI/publisher links skipped per policy.

mismatches.notes: llms.txt says '71 WIN entries documenting all 69 dome WIN numbers'. wins.json now has 72 entries (70 numbered + 057b + 058b). Count is stale by 1.

mismatches.expected: 72 catalog entries = 70 dome-tracked wins plus 2 numbered-collision sub-claims
mismatches.found: ${total} catalog entries = 69 dome-claimed wins plus 2 numbered-collision sub-claims
mismatches.notes: The formula 69+2=71 does not match ${total}=72. wins.json has WIN-001..070 (70 numbered) + 057b + 058b = 72. WIN-070 is an analyst-tracked entry not in the dome's current published 69. The dome site confirms 69 WINs (001-069 on wins.html). Caption arithmetic is off by 1. This is a hardcoded-formula issue in generate-html.js, not in sections.json.

data_prose_consistency.details: wins.json: 72 entries. Verdicts: Refuted-by-Data=12, Self-Contradicted=20, Misleading=16, Std-Model-Explains=18, Not-Demonstrated=3, Unfalsifiable=3. new_in_v51=32. Dome site: 69 WINs (001-069). We track 70 numbered + 2 b-variants. llms.txt count stale by 1.

win_detail_consistency.details: All 72 WIN IDs have corresponding id='winNNN' anchors in rebuilt HTML. WINs 057b and 058b confirmed present post-rebuild. All WINs have tldr_evidence and tldr_verdict fields (0 missing). All 14 genuinely-prospective predictions have tldr fields.

win_dome_alignment.notes: Dome site (john09289.github.io/predictions/wins.html) has WIN-001 through WIN-069 = 69 WINs, claiming '69 confirmed'. We cover WIN-001..070 + 057b + 058b = 72 entries. WIN-070 ('Forensic Zoom chart proves κ=1.67') is present in our wins.json with new_in_v51=false but does not appear on the dome wins page — may be from another dome page or analyst-added. No title drift detected on WIN-001..069. No b-variants on dome site. No canary fix detected (OTS wrong-side error still present).
win_dome_alignment.details: Fetched dome wins page: 200 OK. 69 unique WIN refs (001-069). Dome still displays '69 confirmed'. No WIN-070 on dome site or index page.

progressive_disclosure.details: All 72 WINs have tldr_evidence and tldr_verdict. All 14 genuinely-prospective predictions have tldr field. Test suite Section 8 (Prediction Panels) passed: 79 panels checked.

hardcoded_colors.details: Zero hardcoded light-theme colors (#fff, #ffffff, #f8f9fa, etc.) found in data/sections.json inline styles.

discoverability.details: llms.txt: present, contains review URL and dome model name, but WIN count is stale ('71 WIN entries' vs actual 72). sitemap.xml: valid XML, urlset present, contains main page URL + llms.txt URL. robots.txt: present, Allow:/ and Sitemap: directive present. uncounted-failures.json: 18 entries, no duplicate IDs, all entries have required fields. Meta tags in index.html: description, og:title, og:description, ld+json, ClaimReview all present.

build_reproducibility.details: Workspace FUSE copy of docs/index.html was stale before this run: had 70 WIN anchors (id='win001'..id='win070') but wins.json has 72 entries (including 057b and 058b). Integrity agent triggered 'node build.js html' which regenerated the workspace copy — now has 72 WIN anchors. IMPORTANT: The live published site (GitHub Pages) was already current, confirmed by fetching funwithscience.net/dome-model-review/ which shows id='win057b' and WIN-058b content (73 id= attrs including 1 false match). The workspace FUSE drift means agents reading docs/index.html from the workspace mount were getting stale content. ISS-2095 (open) tracks a related 2026-05-16 push failure event. The rebuilt workspace HTML is now in the FUSE mount but docs/index.html is git-owned — it will only reach GitHub via a decider push from a clean clone.

expansion_tracker.orphaned_output_files: OK: all 223 canonical EXP-NNN.json files have tracker entries (live or archive)
expansion_tracker.phantom_entries: OK: 0 complete entries with missing output files
expansion_tracker.stale_pending: OK: 0 live pending items older than 48h
expansion_tracker.live_terminal_state: OK: 0 live items with integrated=true or terminal status (ISS-2100 resolved)
expansion_tracker.id_gaps: MAJOR: 86 missing IDs across 12 gap ranges. Largest gaps: EXP-324..348 (25 IDs), EXP-350..376 (27 IDs). None of the gap IDs have canonical EXP-NNN.json files, but many have suffixed variants in the expansions directory (e.g. EXP-326-WIN-021-tau-I-framing-close.json) indicating work was done under those IDs using non-canonical naming. No collision risk (next_id=425 is correct). Gap represents allocated IDs whose canonical files were never written and whose tracker entries were never created — effectively untracked completed work. No existing ISS covers this specifically.
expansion_tracker.details: Live items: 2 (EXP-190:draft_awaiting_human_group_review, EXP-424:pending). Archive: 389 entries. Previously reported major issues (ISS-2099, ISS-2100, ISS-2101, live-archive overlap, next_id collision) are all resolved.

curmudgeon_digest.details: Digest freshly regenerated (exit 0, no parse errors). 1 unprocessed review (normal pipeline lag). No systematic filter gap.

workspace_sync.details: No direction violations. 200 mtime-guard skips (normal — git versions of applied-patches and other decider files are newer than workspace copies). ISS-2099 (EXP-409/410 workspace-only) confirmed resolved: both files present on GitHub.

coupled_categories.details: 0 expansion-tracker items with category section-new or category-proposal-writeup in non-integrated state. No queue coupling issues.

drift_audit.details: drift-audit.json is 48h old, within 72h threshold. 18 candidates queued for curmudgeon change-detection review. No refresh triggered.

workspace_only_files.details: 2 workspace-only files in curmudgeon/reviews but both are .js script artifacts (not JSON review files, not processed by digest). 1 .bak file in expansions (not a tracked data file). No genuine data files are workspace-only. All EXP-409 and EXP-410 files (ISS-2099 subject) confirmed in GitHub.

issues_found.description: Workspace FUSE copy of docs/index.html was stale: 70 WIN anchors present vs 72 entries in wins.json (missing id='win057b' and id='win058b'). Integrity agent triggered rebuild — workspace copy now current. Live published site was already current (057b/058b present on GitHub Pages). Workspace drift affects agents reading index.html from FUSE mount.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Decider should rebuild from a clean clone and push to confirm parity. ISS-2095 (2026-05-16 push failure) may cover the root cause. Check whether workspace-sync needs to trigger rebuild on workspace-owned data changes.

issues_found.description: monitor/scripts/audit-rewrite.js is missing. PROP-041 Phase 2 requires this script for mechanical content-preservation pre-check before RW-NNN proposals are pushed to the priority queue. The test suite (Section 12) explicitly checks for its presence and fails. No ISS currently tracks this gap.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Decider or tinker should create monitor/scripts/audit-rewrite.js per the PROP-041 Phase 2 spec (see monitor/prompts/sloppytoppy-rewrite.md for the interface it must implement). Create ISS to track.

issues_found.description: 86 missing EXP IDs across 12 gap ranges in the expansion tracker (live+archive combined). Largest gaps: EXP-324..348 (25 IDs), EXP-350..376 (27 IDs), EXP-378..383 (6 IDs). Suffixed variant files exist in the expansions directory for many of these IDs (e.g. EXP-326-WIN-021-tau-I-framing-close.json) suggesting work was done but never formally tracked under canonical IDs. No collision risk — next_id=425 > max_id=424.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Audit the gap ranges. For each gap ID that has a corresponding suffixed variant file, either (a) add a retroactive tracker entry with no_output_file_reason='completed via suffixed variant' and status=complete, or (b) accept the gap as permanently untracked lost history and document it in a known-gaps note. No urgent action needed given no collision risk.

issues_found.description: docs/llms.txt states '71 WIN entries' but wins.json has 72 entries (70 numbered WINs + 057b + 058b). Count is stale by 1. The description '...documenting all 69 dome WIN numbers' is technically accurate for dome-claimed WINs but doesn't account for analyst-added WIN-070.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Social agent should update llms.txt: '71 WIN entries' → '72 WIN entries (70 numbered; WIN-057b and WIN-058b are numbered-collision sub-entries; WIN-070 is an analyst-tracked claim)'. Commit via decider.

issues_found.description: generate-html.js line 500 has hardcoded caption: '${total} catalog entries = 69 dome-claimed wins plus 2 numbered-collision sub-claims'. The formula 69+2=71 does not equal ${total}=72. WIN-070 is unaccounted for in the caption. The rendered page shows '72 catalog entries = 69 dome-claimed wins plus 2 numbered-collision sub-claims' which is arithmetically inconsistent.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Update caption to account for WIN-070: e.g. '${total} catalog entries = 69 dome-claimed wins, 1 analyst-added claim (WIN-070), plus 2 numbered-collision sub-claims'. Or dynamically compute from wins.json fields.

issues_found.description: ISS-2095 ('Published docs/index.html is stale — 8h behind decider patches') remains open but the live published site appears current: funwithscience.net/dome-model-review/ shows WIN-057b and WIN-058b anchors. The 2026-05-16 push failure described in ISS-2095 appears to have been remediated by a subsequent decider run.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Decider should verify live site has all content from the 2026-05-16 patch set (WIN-052 defense preemption, SEC-4.6 'six'→'five', sub-table lead-in) and close ISS-2095 if confirmed.

ISS-2100: 11 terminal live tracker items — live tracker now clean (0 terminal items)
ISS-2101: baby-orphan-ISS stale pending items — ISS closed
next_id collision (was next_id=395 <= max_id=407) — resolved, now next_id=425 > max_id=424
Live-archive overlap (4 EXP IDs in both live and archive) — resolved, disjoint
summary: Overall status: WARN. The test suite passes 3677/3678 checks — the single failure is a missing monitor/scripts/audit-rewrite.js (PROP-041 Phase 2 requirement, no ISS yet). The workspace FUSE copy of docs/index.html was stale before this run (70 WIN anchors vs 72 in wins.json, missing 057b/058b); integrity triggered a local rebuild and the workspace copy is now current. Critically, the live published site was already up to date — this was workspace drift, not published-site drift; tracked under ISS-2095. The expansion tracker is in good shape: next_id correct (425>424), live/archive disjoint, no orphaned files, no stale items — all prior major issues (ISS-2099/2100/2101, collision, overlap) are resolved. One structural concern: 86 missing EXP IDs in 12 gap ranges (no ISS), with corresponding suffixed variant files existing in the directory — work was done but never formally tracked. No collision risk. External data links all OK. Discoverability files present; llms.txt WIN count stale by 1 (says 71, should be 72). No hardcoded light-theme colors. Drift audit fresh at 48h with 18 candidates. Two new untracked findings needing ISS: missing audit-rewrite.js (major) and EXP ID gaps (major).
